steps.title: Recognize the controlling metaphor
steps.content: The ill-balanced axe and strokes had gone awry frame the speakers' attempts to articulate their ideas as inherently difficult and unsuccessful.

steps.title: Apply the metaphor to the choices
steps.content: An ill-balanced axe is ineffective by nature; when strokes “go awry,” the effort fails entirely. This metaphorical language portrays speakers struggling to express their conception of art clearly in a public setting—a struggle so acute that they immediately seek to correct themselves in private conversation. The underlined portions don't depict literal artistic construction (B), address the reputation of existing artworks (A), or reflect group dissatisfaction (C). That matches choice D — D is correct.
